ENGNew: The Bride and the Groom's Father
changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "The Bride and The Groom's Father"

TextENGNew: ``...So you really did come.``
I was sitting down at the veranda with my legs stretched toward the garden, and without turning around I said that to the presence approaching from behind.
...Riku left for a village meeting today and said he'd be back late. So, this was the best opportunity to talk without him overhearing anything.
``...@k@vS20/00/VTT_rikuF3002. I have to return to the castle again tomorrow.@k@vS20/00/VTT_rikuF3003. So I was hoping I could at least talk to you before that...``
``I don't mind.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3053. After all, I have something to tell you as well.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3054. ...Did Riku tell you?``
I let out a light sigh after hearing that to calm my emotions.
This morning, Riku had gone in the back room with his father who'd just returned from the castle, saying they needed to talk in private.
The fact he asked me to clean the ritual storehouse in the meantime... meant I didn't even need to ask to know what they had talked about.
``I've given you nothing but one absurd trouble after the next, haven't I?@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3056. Between raising Riku and now this... I feel more guilty than grateful.``
``I am unworthy of your words.@k@vS20/00/VTT_rikuF3006. He has grown into a compassionate and earnest young man... Perhaps this is nepotism talking, but I'm proud to be his father.``
``I can say now that I treasure him as much as I would my own flesh and blood, and I am confident he will not make a fool of himself no matter what he does.``

``...Your assessment isn't wrong.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3058. It was a wise decision to leave him in your hands, if I do say so myself.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3059. When I see you and your son, I am thoroughly reminded that it is through parents that children can grow up securely.``
``...I am honored.``
I heard a slight folding sound... I could sense Riku's father sitting at the edge of the living room, firmly staring at me.
And so...
I finally made up my mind, turned back to him, and spoke.
``...I want to hear what you think.``
``I'm not good at being delicate, so... do you approve, or do you oppose it?@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3062. That's all I want to know.``
``...@k@vS20/00/VTT_rikuF3011. I cannot say I wholeheartedly approve.@k@vS20/00/VTT_rikuF3012. You should already be aware of that yourself.``
``I thought as much...``
I covered my face to conceal the bitter smile that rose to my face.
Just as I'd predicted and expected... If our positions were reversed, even I'd likely give the same answer.
The argument of whether he was a broadminded or narrowminded father was completely meaningless in this situation...
``Most of the adults in this village still remember the demon raid 20 years ago.``

``And the fear and devastation from that isn't simply limited to the survivors, but also their children, siblings, and immigrants who have all been told the story, leaving vivid memories.@k@vS20/00/VTT_rikuF3015. Which is why...``
``It's very inconvenient for one with horns like myself to be part of your family.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3065. ...Is that it?``
``...Please do not say something so mean-spirited.@k@vS20/00/VTT_rikuF3017. This is not a problem with me and my son.``
``It may seem like peace has returned to this village at a glance... but deep down everyone is truly afraid that the demons will attack again.``
``It's true that me and a number of other humans know that Oyashiro-sama protected us... but the majority of people can't tell the difference.``
``A rumor of even a single demon sighting could be enough to drive the whole village into panic.``
``You're right...@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3067. Forgive my meaningless words.``
I meekly lowered my head, ashamed of my biased way of speaking.
Though this might have been less of a weight on my mind if Riku's father had been narrowminded...

``...Truth be told, I do understand... or at least, I'd like to think I do.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3069. Leaving here would probably solve everything and be the best possible tactic.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3070. ...But... while it's pathetic to admit, I can't help it.``
``I never thought I'd open my heart to someone... the way I have with Riku.``
``I understand.@k@vS20/00/VTT_rikuF3022. ...I myself am no saint, nor do I have a heart of stone.``
``Even for us, it is nearly impossible to suppress our love and desire for others.@k@vS20/00/VTT_rikuF3024. So, I know that I have no right to flatly deny your heart.``
``And... Riku, who is normally so obedient, absolutely refuses to change his mind when it comes to marrying you.@k@vS20/00/VTT_rikuF3026. He said he'll never take another woman but you as his wife.``
``That's not something he decided upon recently... he's felt that way ever since he met you.@k@vS20/00/VTT_rikuF3028. ...As his father, I wish to respect that firm desire of his.``
``Are...@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3074. Are you really... all right with that?``
Riku's father gently smiled... and nodded at that question.
...Something hot nearly poured from my eyes at that moment, but I blinked over and over again and desperately held it in.
``As you know... I am not originally of this world.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3076. Therefore, it wouldn't be too far off to say I am not human.``
``...Can you truly say you're all right... with letting someone like that marry your beloved son?``
``Yes.@k@vS20/00/VTT_rikuF3030. You saved a baby from a burning house and entrusted him to me... In hindsight, it must have been fate that brought this day about.``
``So I will just abide by it.@k@vS20/00/VTT_rikuF3032. ...Please, take good care of him for many years to come.``

``...Yes...@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3079. I swear... Yes, I promise you...@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3080. I'll give everything I have... for Riku and the Furude family...!@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3081. As long as it's for his happiness, I'll accept any hardship that comes my way...!``
I turned away and looked up to the sky so he couldn't see the tears gushing out my eyes.
I'd sworn Riku was the only one I'd let see me cry... so as the guardian deity of Onigafuchi Village, I couldn't afford to be seen like this.
The sunset sky is dyed vermillion, my body enveloped by the sweet smell of cherry blossoms and a comfortable warmth.
...I don't know how long Riku and I can stay together.
Even if life goes on peacefully and uneventfully... a long-lived Ryuun like me will have to witness the end of his life someday.
And even if I end up dying first in battle with a Grifys... it would be difficult for him to see my end.
So with or without Riku, I know for sure I'll die alone in the end.
But...
The joy of spending time with someone more important than my own life, and being able to remember it... was irreplaceable.
``I will help you out as much as I can.@k@vS20/00/VTT_rikuF3034. I spoke to Riku yesterday about how we'll deal with special events in the village, so please leave that to us.``
``...Thank you.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3084. Also... there's something we need to talk about.``
I remembered something serious I had to tell Riku's father. Then, after calming myself down... I wove my words together one after another.
``If... the truth about me gets out to the villagers... then don't hesitate.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3086. Kill me as a demon.``
``And hold a ceremony using my body as a sacrifice to quell the demons' anger.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3088. By doing so... peace will return to the village.``
``Oyashiro-sama...!``

``Naturally, I'll be taking constant caution... so that it won't come to that.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3090. But I want to entrust you with that message just to be safe.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3091. Take this...``
I said that, took out a sealed letter on my person, and gave it to Riku's father. The moment he opened and read it... he looked back at me in shock.
``O... Oyashiro-sama!@k@vS20/00/VTT_rikuF3037. Wh-what is this...?!``
``...The means to slay us Ryuun.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3093. Your weapons have no hope of fatally wounding me.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3094. So... I wrote it down here.``
``Should the worst come to pass... inform a skilled warrior of it and have them strike me down.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3096. ...Please.``
``...@k@vS20/00/VTT_rikuF3039. Understood.``
He slowly nodded... seemingly realizing why I'd told him and not Riku about this.
Because if I told this to Riku, he would obviously refuse on the spot.
``Also... is it true that you oversee this village's ancient writings?``
``Yes, what of it...?``

``Then... I'd like to give this to you as well.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3099. It's about the legend of the demons, passed down through Onigafuchi Village.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3100. As things stand now, fear of the demons will likely remain.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3101. So...``
